en: Do you know how to use this English word Schedule
ko: 이 영어 단어 어떻게 쓰는지 알아? Schedule

en: Schedule It's a verb that means to plan when and where events will happen
ko: Schedule. 이벤트가 언제 어디서 열릴지 계획하다라는 뜻의 동사야

en: Here's an example Schedule the tasting Schedule the tasting
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list
I'll schedule the tasting once we finalize the spice list
That's cutting it close Can we avoid chaos Let's review
ko: 빠듯하네. 혼란을 피할 수 있을까? 복습하자

en: Schedule the tasting Schedule the tasting
